## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX to discuss content performance, strategy refinement, and quality improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/D-U1Tw7PaC2WXs5-zZyAZ9LiBCHGwbsa?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance shows positive trends with increased clicks (+100) and impressions (+40K) week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/D-U1Tw7PaC2WXs5-zZyAZ9LiBCHGwbsa?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Team agrees to shift focus towards enriching existing high-potential content rather than solely increasing volume](https://fathom.video/share/D-U1Tw7PaC2WXs5-zZyAZ9LiBCHGwbsa?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [New approach: treat blog posts as products, create backlogs for improvements, and aim for "Nikan-worthy" content quality](https://fathom.video/share/D-U1Tw7PaC2WXs5-zZyAZ9LiBCHGwbsa?tab=summary&timestamp=1668.0)
  - [Commercial panels implementation complete; team to refine relevance and placement strategy](https://fathom.video/share/D-U1Tw7PaC2WXs5-zZyAZ9LiBCHGwbsa?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Analysis

  - [Week-over-week metrics: 25% increase in clicks, improved average CTR](https://fathom.video/share/D-U1Tw7PaC2WXs5-zZyAZ9LiBCHGwbsa?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Month-over-month: Better total clicks and impressions](https://fathom.video/share/D-U1Tw7PaC2WXs5-zZyAZ9LiBCHGwbsa?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [Comparison between AI-generated (95 articles) and human-written (15 articles) content:](https://fathom.video/share/D-U1Tw7PaC2WXs5-zZyAZ9LiBCHGwbsa?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
      - [AI: 435 clicks, 180K impressions](https://fathom.video/share/D-U1Tw7PaC2WXs5-zZyAZ9LiBCHGwbsa?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
      - [Human: 225 clicks, 40K impressions](https://fathom.video/share/D-U1Tw7PaC2WXs5-zZyAZ9LiBCHGwbsa?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [Team acknowledges different strengths: AI good for top-funnel, humans for bottom-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/D-U1Tw7PaC2WXs5-zZyAZ9LiBCHGwbsa?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Current focus: CMS comparison topics (30+ in pipeline)](https://fathom.video/share/D-U1Tw7PaC2WXs5-zZyAZ9LiBCHGwbsa?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
  - [Metadata optimization for 10 high-impression, low-click articles](https://fathom.video/share/D-U1Tw7PaC2WXs5-zZyAZ9LiBCHGwbsa?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)
  - [Commercial panels implemented across 100+ articles](https://fathom.video/share/D-U1Tw7PaC2WXs5-zZyAZ9LiBCHGwbsa?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)
  - [New direction:](https://fathom.video/share/D-U1Tw7PaC2WXs5-zZyAZ9LiBCHGwbsa?tab=summary&timestamp=1796.0)
      - [Reduce new content volume to focus on enriching existing high-potential pieces](https://fathom.video/share/D-U1Tw7PaC2WXs5-zZyAZ9LiBCHGwbsa?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
      - [Add visuals, examples, and improve formatting](https://fathom.video/share/D-U1Tw7PaC2WXs5-zZyAZ9LiBCHGwbsa?tab=summary&timestamp=1837.0)
      - [Aim for content quality that team would confidently share with clients](https://fathom.video/share/D-U1Tw7PaC2WXs5-zZyAZ9LiBCHGwbsa?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)

### Quality Improvement Initiatives

  - [Create a curated list of exemplary websites for visual references](https://fathom.video/share/D-U1Tw7PaC2WXs5-zZyAZ9LiBCHGwbsa?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
  - [Incorporate design evaluation criteria from "Best B2B SaaS Websites" asset](https://fathom.video/share/D-U1Tw7PaC2WXs5-zZyAZ9LiBCHGwbsa?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
  - [Explore adding video content and UI walkthroughs for products like Storyblock](https://fathom.video/share/D-U1Tw7PaC2WXs5-zZyAZ9LiBCHGwbsa?tab=summary&timestamp=1696.0)
  - [Develop a "trust-to-sources" engine to incorporate thought leaders and credible sources](https://fathom.video/share/D-U1Tw7PaC2WXs5-zZyAZ9LiBCHGwbsa?tab=summary&timestamp=1849.0)

### Workflow Adjustments

  - [Treat each blog post as a product with its own backlog](https://fathom.video/share/D-U1Tw7PaC2WXs5-zZyAZ9LiBCHGwbsa?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Focus on high-value, well-performing content for deeper improvements](https://fathom.video/share/D-U1Tw7PaC2WXs5-zZyAZ9LiBCHGwbsa?tab=summary&timestamp=1668.0)
  - [Balance between continuing to plant "seeds" and enriching existing content](https://fathom.video/share/D-U1Tw7PaC2WXs5-zZyAZ9LiBCHGwbsa?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Aim for "Nikan-worthy" content quality as the new standard](https://fathom.video/share/D-U1Tw7PaC2WXs5-zZyAZ9LiBCHGwbsa?tab=summary&timestamp=1834.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel's team to develop a refined strategy for content enrichment by next week](https://fathom.video/share/D-U1Tw7PaC2WXs5-zZyAZ9LiBCHGwbsa?tab=summary&timestamp=1880.0)
  - [Webstacks to provide a curated list of exemplary websites for visual references](https://fathom.video/share/D-U1Tw7PaC2WXs5-zZyAZ9LiBCHGwbsa?tab=summary&timestamp=1899.0)
  - [Explore implementation of design criteria into the content creation model](https://fathom.video/share/D-U1Tw7PaC2WXs5-zZyAZ9LiBCHGwbsa?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Begin shifting focus to quality improvements while maintaining a reduced publishing schedule](https://fathom.video/share/D-U1Tw7PaC2WXs5-zZyAZ9LiBCHGwbsa?tab=summary&timestamp=1899.0)
  - [Consider creating an AI persona based on a movie/TV character for a fun content experiment](https://fathom.video/share/D-U1Tw7PaC2WXs5-zZyAZ9LiBCHGwbsa?tab=summary&timestamp=1932.0)
